title: Fix remote player smoothing + NPC first-sync snap + tabbed-out grey

log.context: Fix remote player smoothing + NPC first-sync snap + tabbed-out grey

All three fixes are applied and deployed. Here's a summary:

**Fix 1 - Remote player snap to grid** (`/mnt/data/hello-world/grazing.html` + `/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`):
- `sendPlayerMove()` now sends `px`/`py` (pixel coords) alongside `tx`/`ty`
- Server stores `px`/`py` in `CommonsPlayer` and broadcasts them
- `players` message handler stores `targetX`/`targetY` from pixel coords, initializes `renderX`/`renderY` on first receive (snap) then preserves across updates
- `drawRemotePlayers()` ...(truncated)
